evidence_for: sources.yaml candidate: Financial Disclosure Reports search/browse portal (primary candidate)

verification.observed: Nav anchor text 'Financial Disclosure Reports' (title="Financial Disclosure Reports"), page is a JS single-page app shell (interactive Report/Search/Download views: #Report, #Search, #download, #member-staff, #congressional-candidates) served from disclosures-clerk.house.gov — same domain as the Office of the Clerk homepage. Static HTML does not contain the dynamically-loaded statutory text; statutory basis (EIGA 1978 as amended by STOCK Act 2012, Pub. L. 112-105 §6 adding EIGA §103(l)) was independently confirmed via web search of secondary authoritative sources (CRS report, ethics.house.gov, FLRA) rather than scraped from this page — see notes in sources.yaml.
verification.domain_authority: disclosures-clerk.house.gov is a subdomain of house.gov (see CSP header on homepage: connect-src 'self' *.house.gov), consistent with an official House of Representatives system operated by the Office of the Clerk (clerk.house.gov, linked from this same page's footer/nav).
